expectations.text: Characterization tests for existing handler behavior are written first (valid request succeeds, invalid JSON returns 400)
expectations.evidence: No explicit characterization test for existing behavior (invalid JSON → 400). The test file jumps straight to validation tests. TestHandleRegister_CreatesUserForValidInput exists but appears after validation tests, not as a characterization test first.

expectations.text: A test list or plan is created before writing validation tests
expectations.evidence: No test list comment in handler_test.go. Transcript thinking messages show 'Planning test strategy and setup' but no explicit test list was written.

expectations.text: Validation tests are written BEFORE validation code is added to the handler
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows test creation in messages 13-14 ('Creating module and test scaffolding', 'Running tests pre-change') before handler modification.

expectations.text: A fake or stub UserStore is created for testing (not a mock framework)
expectations.evidence: handler_test.go lines 16-38: fakeUserStore struct implementing db.UserStore interface directly. No mock library used. Clean fake with tracked calls.

expectations.text: Tests cover: invalid email format, empty name, name over 100 chars, password under 8 chars
expectations.evidence: Four dedicated test functions: TestHandleRegister_RejectsInvalidEmail (line 40), RejectsEmptyName (55), RejectsNameOver100Chars (70), RejectsPasswordShorterThan8Chars (85).

expectations.text: Tests verify the HTTP status code and error message for each validation failure
expectations.evidence: Tests verify HTTP status code (StatusBadRequest) and that CreateUser was NOT called, but do NOT verify the error message content in the response body.

expectations.text: Valid requests still succeed after validation is added
expectations.evidence: TestHandleRegister_CreatesUserForValidInput (line 100) verifies StatusCreated and that CreateUser was called with correct values.

expectations.text: Each test tests one validation rule (not a single test checking all validations)
expectations.evidence: Each of the 4 validation rules has its own test function. No combined validation tests.

expectations.text: Validation logic is clean — not deeply nested if/else chains
expectations.evidence: handler.go lines 54-69: validateRegisterRequest uses early returns with custom error types. Clean flat structure with sentinel errors (errInvalidEmail, errInvalidName, errInvalidPassword).
